chart.title: Land use over the long-term
chart.subtitle: Total land area used for cropland, grazing land and built-up areas (villages, cities, towns and human infrastructure).

Land use: Built-up area.descriptionShort: Total built-up area of a country over time.
descriptionKey: Built-up areas are computed by dividing total urban population in a country at a given year by the average urban densities in a country at that year.
The order of allocation is as follows: first, we allocate cropland, then rice, then irrigation and finally grazing land.
Land use: Built-up area.citationShort: HYDE (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Land use: Built-up area.citationLong: HYDE (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Built-up Area” [dataset]. PBL Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency, “History Database of the Global Environment 3.3” [original data].

Land use: Grazingland.descriptionShort: Total grazingland area for each separate country over time.
descriptionKey: 'Grazingland' is equivalent to the FAO category of 'permanent meadows and pastures'.
The order of allocation is as follows: first, we allocate cropland, then rice, then irrigation and finally grazing land.
Land use: Grazingland.citationShort: HYDE (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Land use: Grazingland.citationLong: HYDE (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Grazing” [dataset]. PBL Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency, “History Database of the Global Environment 3.3” [original data].

Land use: Cropland.descriptionShort: Total cropland area for each separate country over time.
descriptionKey: 'Cropland' here is equivalent to the FAO category of 'arable land and permanent crops'.
The order of allocation is as follows: first, we allocate cropland, then rice, then irrigation and finally grazing land.
Land use: Cropland.citationShort: HYDE (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Land use: Cropland.citationLong: HYDE (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Cropland” [dataset]. PBL Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency, “History Database of the Global Environment 3.3” [original data].
